items.title: A New Studio Layout
items.description: The viewer is rebuilt around one flat toolbar with a Single, Strip, and Grid switcher. Every control now has a permanent home.

items.title: Info & Insights Inspector
items.description: A docked panel shows filename, dimensions, exposure settings, dates, and location. Text is selectable, and clicking a row copies its value. AI Insights lives in the second tab.

items.title: Grid View, Docked
items.description: The grid now lives inside the window instead of covering it. Adjust thumbnail size with the density slider and sort by name, date, or size.

items.title: One Zoom Control
items.description: A single zoom pill replaces five buttons. Pick a preset from its menu, or double-click the photo to jump between Fit and 100%.

items.title: A Proper Stage for Photos
items.description: Images sit on a dedicated darker canvas instead of the window background. Light mode adds a soft cast shadow.

items.title: A Calmer Escape Key
items.description: Escape steps back one level, from grid to single. It never exits your folder; press B for that.

items.title: Cleaner Thumbnails
items.description: Index badges are gone. The selected image is marked with an accent ring, nothing else.

items.title: Bigger Default Window
items.description: New windows open at 1180 by 740 points, sized for the new layout.

items.title: Keyboard Shortcuts Stay Responsive
items.description: Shortcuts no longer stop working after you interact with panels and controls.
